description: Address semantic review issues: fix SecurityEngine data race on nextThreatId_, remove stale idIndex_ from LogStorage, and add EventBus/ServiceLocator integration to key sub-components
steps: Make SecurityEngine::nextThreatId_ std::atomic<uint64_t> to fix data race in generateThreatId()
Remove dead idIndex_ from LogStorage since getById already does linear scan and the index is stale after eviction
Add EventBus publishing to AlertEngine::createAlert (publish SecurityEvent when alerts are created)
Add EventBus publishing to CorrelationEngine::evaluate (publish SecurityEvent when correlations fire)
Add EventBus publishing to LogCollector::collect (publish SecurityEvent on ingestion)
Add EventBus publishing to CaseManager::createCase and CaseManager::escalate (publish SecurityEvent)
Register key engines (SIEMEngine, SOCManager) with ServiceLocator in their constructors
Rebuild and run all tests to confirm all 1618 tests still pass
acceptance_criteria: SecurityEngine::nextThreatId_ is std::atomic<uint64_t> - no data race possible
LogStorage has no idIndex_ - dead code removed
AlertEngine publishes SecurityEvent via EventBus when creating alerts
CorrelationEngine publishes SecurityEvent via EventBus when correlations fire
LogCollector publishes SecurityEvent via EventBus on ingestion
CaseManager publishes SecurityEvent via EventBus on case creation and escalation
Key engines registered with ServiceLocator in facade constructors
